sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27850" key="dokhside/cios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δοκησῐ-δέξιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n27850.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">clever in one's own conceit,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:154" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">154</biblScope></bibl>, Callias Com.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
